## Checklist

- [ ] `⌘U` tests pass
- [ ] SwiftLint reports no new errors
- [ ] Added/updated `#Preview` for any new or changed view
- [ ] Added accessibility labels for meaningful symbols
- [ ] Updated `README.md` if the feature set changed
